title: Speaking - Part 2
description: Look at the photograph and say what you can see.

tasks.instructions: Here is your photograph. It shows people at a birthday party. Please tell us what you can see in the photograph.

images.label: A
images.description: A group of children are celebrating a birthday in a living room. One child is blowing out candles on a cake while the others are smiling. There are balloons, party hats and presents on the table.

followUp.question: Talk about the people. Talk about the place. Talk about other things in the photograph.

tasks.instructions: Here is your photograph. It shows people gardening. Please tell us what you can see in the photograph.

images.label: B
images.description: A man and a girl are working in a garden together. The man is digging in the soil and the girl is watering flowers. There are plants, gardening tools and a small house in the background.

followUp.question: Talk about the people. Talk about the place. Talk about other things in the photograph.
